text:
Development-oriented finance is an important means in compliance
                                                                                                                     with the needs of national development and the requirement of
                                                                                                                     financial system reform to mitigate the constraints and address
                                                                                                                     development issues, an important manifestation of the socialist mar-
                                                                                                                     ket economy with Chinese characteristics; it reflects the advanced
                                                                                                                     productive forces, advanced culture and the fundamental interests of
                                                                                                                     the overwhelming majority; and it is also a key demonstration of the
                                                                                                                     scientific outlook on development and an essential force of the
                                                                                                                     modernization drive.
